questions.scenario: The Container App `ca-devpolaris-orders-prod` is running, but the team cannot find runtime logs in `law-devpolaris-prod`. Which Azure configuration should they check before changing application code?

options.text: Diagnostic settings on the Container App that send console and system logs to the workspace.
The SQL database retention policy, because database backup settings control app logs.
The action group, because alert receivers decide which logs are collected.
The storage lifecycle policy, because log search depends on blob tiering.

questions.explanation: Diagnostic settings decide which resource logs and metrics leave a resource and arrive in the workspace. Application code may be fine even when collection is missing.

questions.scenario: A production workspace review needs to explain cost and search behavior for `law-devpolaris-prod`. Which details belong in the review?

options.text: Which tables are used for app logs, resource logs, requests, dependencies, and exceptions.
Daily quota or ingestion limit if the team uses one.
The exact screen size of the dashboard where the logs are viewed.

questions.explanation: Retention, tables, and quota affect how long evidence stays searchable and how much it costs. Dashboard screen size does not change log ingestion or retention.
